positive: A stylized, minimal illustration featuring a majestic soaring eagle silhouette with powerful wingspan, surrounded by intricate, swirling cosmic nebula patterns and glowing celestial dust. The eagle is centered and dominates the composition. The style should be a blend of Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock printing techniques (for clean lines and solid areas) and vibrant, bioluminescent cosmic art. Use deep midnight blues, emerald greens, rich gold accents, and stark white highlights for extreme contrast. Composition must be highly symmetrical, suitable for a high-quality t-shirt print. Clean edges, flat areas of color, high contrast, graphic design quality.
